memoryArtifacts.headline: Gilbert de Lancaster (approx 1150-1220)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Gilbert de Lancaster (approx 1150-1220). The founder of the Lancasters of Sockbridge was an illegitimate son of William de Lancaster II (died 1184).

Married Sapience.

Gilbert appears on many charter …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Gilbert de Lancastre "junior" (approx 1180-1265)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Gilbert de Lancastre "junior" (approx 1180-1265). Apparently a knight as an adult, referred to as "Sir" Gilbert.

Circumstantial evidence that this Gilbert is son and not only heir to the previous one …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred於1157年之後出生在英國維斯特莫藍德時，他的父親Roger FitzReinfrid8856歲，母親Alice Foliot8859歲。他與Helewise de Lancaster結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1220年5月5日在英國英格蘭恩布利亞肯達爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred was born after 1157, in Westmorland, England, his father, Roger FitzReinfrid, was 8856 and his mother, Alice Foliot, was 8859. He married Helewise de Lancaster. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 5 May 1220, in Kendal, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred est né après 1157, à Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Roger FitzReinfrid, avait 8856 ans et sa mère, Alice Foliot, avait 8859 ans. Il a épousé Helewise de Lancaster. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 5 mai 1220, à Kendal, Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred nach 1157 in Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger FitzReinfrid 8856 und seine Mutter Alice Foliot 8859. Er hat Helewise de Lancaster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Mai 1220 in Kendal, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred è nato il dopo il 1157 nel Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Roger FitzReinfrid, aveva 8856 anni e il suo madre, Alice Foliot, aveva 8859 anni. Lui sposato Helewise de Lancaster. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 5 maggio 1220, nel Kendal, Cumbria, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfredが1157年以後にイギリスウエストモーランドで生まれた時，父Roger FitzReinfridは8856歳，母Alice Foliotは8859歳であった。Helewise de Lancasterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1220年5月5日にイギリスイギリスクウンブリアケンダルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred(이)가 1157년 이후 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger FitzReinfrid(은)는 8856세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Foliot(은)는 8859세였다. 그는 Helewise de Lancaster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1220년 5월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 쿠브리아 켄다에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred nasceu após 1157, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger FitzReinfrid, tinha 8856 anos e sua mãe, Alice Foliot, tinha 8859 anos. Ele casou-se com Helewise de Lancaster. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de maio de 1220, em Kendal, Cumbria, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred родился после 1157 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger FitzReinfrid было 8856 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Foliot, 8859. Он женился на женщине по имени Helewise de Lancaster. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 5 мая 1220 г. в местности кендаль, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred nació después de 1157, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger FitzReinfrid, tenía 8856 años y su mamá, Alice Foliot, tenía 8859 años. Se casó con Helewise de Lancaster. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 5 de mayo de 1220, en Kendal, Cumbria, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
